name: Kadar
description:
__Affiliations:__ Marines, G-2
__Occupations:__ Marine Rear Admiral 

Kadar is a Marine rear admiral at the G-2 Marine base from fifteen years ago. Kadar was given orders to locate the Sun Pirates and then report back on their position. Upon locating them, his ship was attacked. He told Fisher Tiger to return all the ex-slaves he liberated. Since he did not appear during the G-2 officers' meeting after Ace's intrusion in the base, his current status is unknown.
